response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, open-source contributions, and leadership in project development, but lacks explicit evidence of executive-level leadership, IT architecture design experience (e.g., UML, system-wide modeling), and German proficiency (only 'Basic'), which are critical for this role.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with real-world impact (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
Proven full-stack expertise across diverse technologies (DLang, TypeScript, Node.js, Linux)
Demonstrated mentorship and workshop leadership in testing, TDD, and web internals
concerns: German language proficiency is only 'Basic' — fails minimum C1 requirement
No clear evidence of UML, IT architecture design, or requirements management experience
Leadership roles are technical (staff/senior developer), not executive or team management
